title: Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
summary: MiniMax released M3, an open-weights model for coding agents and long-context workflows with up to 1 million token context window. MiniMax Code is a desktop application and platform offering Agent Team features and multimodal support, compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, and other IDEs through API endpoints.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, an open-weights model aimed at coding agents and long-context workflows with a context window up to 1 million tokens, alongside MiniMax Code, a desktop application and platform that adds Agent Team features and multimodal support. It frames both as alternatives to Claude and Codex for development work. The concrete takeaways: M3 ships with open weights, the platform connects to Claude Code, Cursor, and other IDEs through API endpoints, and the combination targets both agentic coding and tasks that benefit from very large context.
